stemHtml: You encounter moderate turbulence crossing a mountain range. Are you required to report it?

options.a: Yes, a special observation shall be made by data-link, or by voice if data-link is unavailable.
options.b: No, reporting is only mandatory for severe turbulence or severe mountain wave.
options.c: No obligation, but voluntary reports are appreciated if safety of other aircraft could be affected.
options.d: Only if data-link is available; voice reporting alone is not required.
